# misp_warninglist (Data Source)

Look up a MISP warninglist by name.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "misp_warninglist" "akamai" {
  name = "List of known Akamai IP ranges"
}

output "akamai_enabled" {
  value = data.misp_warninglist.akamai.enabled
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String)

### Read-Only

- `category` (String)
- `description` (String)
- `enabled` (Boolean)
- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `type` (String)
- `valid_attributes` (String)
- `version` (String)
- `warninglist_entry_count` (String)
